max_positions_per_tier.note: Concentration limit — prevents overexposure to correlated assets within same tier

tier_1.label: Blue Chips (BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, AVAX, DOT, LINK, POL)
tier_1.note: Guidelines for Sonnet — highest conviction, most patient

tier_2.label: Established (ATOM, NEAR, OP, ARB, SUI, AAVE, UNI, etc.)
tier_2.note: Guidelines for Sonnet — standard risk management

tier_3.label: DISABLED — Tier 3 coins deactivated (too volatile for training)
tier_3.note: Tier 3 deactivated in DB. Only T1 and T2 are traded.

dca.note: DISABLED — 0% DCA win rate (0/2). Re-enable when base win rate exceeds re_enable_win_rate.

thresholds.note: These are ALERTS to Haiku, not trading triggers. The AI decides what matters. OBV thresholds: recent 10-period SMA vs prior 10-period SMA ratio.

confidence_thresholds.note: Safety net — Sonnet can still make intelligent decisions below these, but actions are downgraded

escalation.note: volume_threshold_ceiling prevents learning from raising volume filters above this max. stagnation override activates after N sessions with 0 new trades.

circuit_breaker.note: Safety net — pauses trading after 4 consecutive losses OR total drawdown exceeds max_drawdown_percent

sms.note: SMS via Twilio for critical trade alerts only

exit_scanner.note: Lowered urgency_threshold from 40 to 30 to cut losers faster. Critical bypasses cooldown.

learning.note: min_new_trades_for_update prevents churning rules when no new trade data exists.

fees.note: Per-side trading fee rate. Match to your Binance fee tier.

emergency_stop_loss.note: Hard stop-loss bypass — no AI approval needed. Independent 30s price monitoring loop.
